name: NavigationItem
description: Navigational item for horizontal and vertical groups, supporting links, parent expansion, nesting levels, and custom render behavior.

active.description: Whether the navigation item represents the current page or section

href.description: The URL the navigation item links to. Renders as an anchor element when provided.

orientation.description: The layout direction of the navigation item within its container

expanded.description: Whether the parent navigation item is expanded to show child items

parent.description: Marks item as a parent that can reveal nested items

children.description: Label text, icon, or nested NavigationItem children

onExpand.description: Expand/collapse callback for parent item action

level.description: Nesting level used for hierarchy styling/indentation

blurActive.description: Shows parent as blur-active when active descendant is nested inside collapsed section

render.description: Custom render element/function for integration with routing libraries or custom semantics

slots.children: Label text, optional icon, or nested NavigationItem elements for hierarchical navigation

accessibility.role: link when href is provided; button semantics when used as non-link/parent action
keyboard: Enter/Space: Activate the focused navigation item
Tab: Move focus in/out of navigation group according to tab order
Shift+Tab: Move focus to previous focus target
aria: aria-current='page': Set on the active item to indicate the current page
aria-expanded: Set on parent items to indicate expanded/collapsed state
